COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as reassigment from PJ Department for Court Trial
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Mitch Lyon, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
Suzane Yee, Esq. for Plaintiff Oak S. Hom Wong and Laura Hom Wong, Authorized Agent Christofer Wong also present, was sworn & examined.
No Appearance by defendants
Plaintiff Exhibits:
Exh. A- 5 years Lease
Exh. B- 3 day notice
Ech. C- Proof of service for 3 day notice.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Oak S. Hom Wong and Laura Hom Wong and against the defendants Peter Lambertson and Paul Fischetti as follows:
Damages of $96,277.00
Interest of $8,784.00
Attorney's fees of $4,500.00
Costs of $324.00
For the total of $109,885.00
Judgment signed in open court.
